dealer_service_types.name: Vehicle Sales
dealer_service_types.description: Authorized retailer for new and certified pre-owned vehicles, including sedans, SUVs, and electric models.

dealer_service_types.name: Service & Maintenance
dealer_service_types.description: Factory-trained technicians providing scheduled maintenance, repairs, and warranty service.

dealer_service_types.name: Parts & Accessories
dealer_service_types.description: Genuine parts and accessories, including wheels, cargo solutions, and appearance packages.

dealer_service_types.name: EV Test Drives
dealer_service_types.description: Dealers that offer dedicated electric vehicle test drive appointments and charging demos.

dealer_service_types.name: Electric Vehicle Specialist
dealer_service_types.description: Certified EV experts on-site to answer questions about range, charging, and incentives.

model_categories.name: All Models
model_categories.description: Browse all available sedans, SUVs, crossovers, and performance vehicles.

model_categories.name: Electric & Hybrid
model_categories.description: Explore plug-in hybrids and fully electric vehicles with advanced efficiency and technology.

vehicle_features.name: Ventilated Front Seats
vehicle_features.description: Actively cooled front seats that circulate air through perforated cushions for added comfort.

vehicle_features.name: Premium Audio System
vehicle_features.description: Upgraded multi-speaker audio system with enhanced amplification and richer sound staging.

vehicle_features.name: Power Sunroof
vehicle_features.description: Standard power tilt-and-slide glass sunroof with manual sunshade.

vehicle_features.name: Panoramic Sunroof
vehicle_features.description: Large two-panel panoramic glass roof providing expansive views for front and rear passengers.

vehicle_packages.name: Comfort Sunroof Package
vehicle_packages.description: Adds a power tilt-and-slide glass sunroof with manual sunshade and interior overhead controls.

vehicle_packages.name: Premium Audio Package
vehicle_packages.description: Upgrades to a multi-speaker premium audio system with external amplifier and enhanced bass.

vehicle_packages.name: Luxury Comfort Package
vehicle_packages.description: Combines ventilated front seats, a power sunroof, and premium materials for a more comfortable cabin.

vehicle_packages.name: Panoramic Touring Package
vehicle_packages.description: Large panoramic glass roof and premium audio system designed for highway touring comfort.

vehicle_packages.name: Ventilated Seat Upgrade
vehicle_packages.description: Adds perforated, actively cooled front seats with multiple ventilation levels.

vehicle_packages.name: SkyView Panoramic Roof Package
vehicle_packages.description: Expansive panoramic sunroof with power sunshade, bringing more light into the cabin.

vehicle_packages.name: Luxury Tech Package
vehicle_packages.description: Premium audio, ventilated front seats, and a panoramic sunroof bundled for top-tier comfort and technology.

vehicle_packages.name: Sun & Sound Package
vehicle_packages.description: Pair of popular upgrades: power sunroof and premium audio system.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 City Sedan
vehicle_models.short_description: Agile compact sedan designed for city driving with impressive efficiency and advanced safety tech.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Aurora Compact Sedan
vehicle_models.short_description: Comfort-focused compact sedan with a refined ride and spacious trunk for everyday practicality.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Prestige Sedan
vehicle_models.short_description: Luxury midsize sedan offering ventilated leather seating, premium audio, and advanced driver assistance.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Midsize SUV
vehicle_models.short_description: Versatile midsize SUV with available AWD, generous cargo room, and family-ready comfort.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Compact Hybrid SUV
vehicle_models.short_description: Efficient hybrid compact SUV with over 40 MPG combined and flexible cargo space for active lifestyles.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Compact SUV
vehicle_models.short_description: Sporty compact SUV with available AWD, smart storage solutions, and confident performance.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 City EV
vehicle_models.short_description: All-electric compact sedan with over 250 miles of range, ideal for urban commutes and weekend trips.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Grand EV
vehicle_models.short_description: Long-range electric sedan combining luxury features with an EPA-estimated range over 300 miles.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 E-SUV
vehicle_models.short_description: All-electric AWD SUV with generous cargo volume and fast-charging capability for road-trip versatility.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 City Hatch
vehicle_models.short_description: Urban-friendly hatchback with a tight turning radius and flexible cargo-friendly rear hatch.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Cargo Van
vehicle_models.short_description: Durable cargo van engineered for business needs with configurable storage and high payload capacity.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Performance Coupe
vehicle_models.short_description: Driver-focused coupe with a low center of gravity, responsive handling, and bold styling.

vehicle_models.name: 2025 Family Van
vehicle_models.short_description: Hybrid family van with three rows of seating, sliding doors, and efficient powertrain for long trips.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 Compact SUV from $299/mo for 36 months
offers.headline: $299/month Compact SUV Lease
offers.description: Well-qualified lessees can lease a new 2025 Compact SUV for $299 per month for 36 months with $2,999 due at signing. No security deposit required.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 Compact Hybrid SUV from $349/mo for 36 months
offers.headline: Hybrid SUV Lease from $349/month
offers.description: Lease the fuel-sipping 2025 Compact Hybrid SUV for $349 per month for 36 months with $3,199 due at signing, for well-qualified lessees.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 Midsize SUV from $419/mo for 36 months
offers.headline: Midsize SUV Lease Offer
offers.description: Get a 2025 Midsize SUV with available AWD for $419 per month for 36 months with $3,499 due at signing. Taxes, title and license extra.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 Prestige Sedan from $599/mo for 39 months
offers.headline: Luxury Prestige Sedan Lease
offers.description: Well-qualified lessees can lease a 2025 Prestige Sedan Luxury for $599 per month for 39 months with $4,299 due at signing.

offers.title: Finance a 2025 City Sedan at 1.9% APR for 60 months
offers.headline: Low APR on 2025 City Sedan
offers.description: Qualified buyers can finance a new 2025 City Sedan at 1.9% APR for up to 60 months. Not all buyers will qualify.

offers.title: Finance select 2025 EV models at 2.9% APR for 72 months
offers.headline: Special 2.9% APR on EVs
offers.description: Finance a new 2025 City EV, Grand EV, or E-SUV at 2.9% APR for up to 72 months with approved credit.

offers.title: $1,500 Customer Cash on 2025 City Sedan
offers.headline: $1,500 Cash Allowance
offers.description: Get $1,500 customer cash on the purchase of any new 2025 City Sedan. May not be combined with some other offers.

offers.title: $2,500 EV Bonus Cash on select 2025 EVs
offers.headline: $2,500 EV Bonus Cash
offers.description: Receive $2,500 EV bonus cash on the purchase of a new 2025 City EV or Grand EV. See dealer for details.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 City EV from $429/mo for 36 months
offers.headline: City EV Lease Special
offers.description: Lease the 2025 City EV for $429 per month for 36 months with $3,499 due at signing, plus taxes and fees.

offers.title: Lease a 2025 Family Van from $379/mo for 48 months
offers.headline: Family Van Long-Term Lease
offers.description: Lease the 2025 Family Van hybrid for $379 per month for 48 months with $3,299 due at signing.
